future_gate_requirements: A separate future patch must define any live-restore command; Patch 89 does not contain one.
Nic must explicitly approve the preflight report and target overwrite list before any future restore lever exists.
Forge must create a fresh backup immediately before any future overwrite.
Forge must re-run this preflight immediately before any future live restore.
Forge must refuse secrets, credentials, keys, .env files, ~/.ssh, and unscoped paths.
Forge must preserve rollback evidence and audit every file if a future restore command is ever created.

plain_english.summary: Patch 89 checked current live target files against the latest restore proposal. It did not copy, restore, overwrite, delete, or modify any live file.
plain_english.meaning: Rows marked as overwrite candidates are exactly what a future restore would replace if a later patch and Nic approval ever allow it. This patch only exposes that risk list.
